briefs.title: Port Land Valuation Regulation updated to apply 2026 taxation year assessment values
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 231/2025 amends the Port Land Valuation Regulation to replace all references to the 2025 taxation year with the 2026 taxation year, updating the assessment roll values accordingly.
briefs.action_required: Review your port land property assessment for the 2026 taxation year to confirm updated valuations are correctly applied.

key_dates.label: BC Port Land Valuation Regulation 2026 taxation year values take effect

briefs.industries: Transportation & Logistics, Natural Resources, Landlord & Property Mgmt
